channel.title: politics on T++
channel.description: Recent content in politics on T++

item.title: Being open-minded towards closed-minded people
item.description: This doesn’t specifically apply to the Brandon Eich saga, but it’s come up a lot lately in comments regarding that situation. The idea that being open-minded means being open to everyone, including closed-minded people. Some might call it “being tolerant of intolerance.” I think this is somewhat related to the concept that if someone speaks an opinion, because they have a right to speak it (under the 1st Amendment), that they have a right not to suffer an ill will for it.
